title: Zunkiree Search
description: Your users ask questions. Zunkiree Search gives direct answers — not a list of links to wade through. Natural language understanding out of the box, 50+ connectors, 2-hour integration. Cuts support queries by 45%.

title: Stella
tagline: The sales agent that never clocks out.
description: Stella handles product discovery, answers questions, and completes purchases — autonomously, 24/7. Built for Nepal's ecommerce market with eSewa, Khalti, and international payment support from day one.

title: Zenly
description: Zenly handles complex availability, multi-resource conflicts, and no-show prevention automatically. AI-powered reminders cut no-shows by 35%. Works across clinics, studios, salons, and any service business that runs on appointments.

title: AI CRM
tagline: CRM that sells. Not just stores.
description: Traditional CRM captures what happened. Ours predicts what happens next. Scores leads by conversion likelihood, triggers outreach automatically, and surfaces pipeline risks before deals go cold.

title: Gaamma
description: Gaamma unifies production planning, inventory, quality control, and analytics on one platform built for modern manufacturing. Replace fragmented spreadsheets with a single system your whole factory runs on.

title: Dental AI Assistant
description: Dental AI handles patient communication, appointment scheduling, and follow-up reminders — so your front desk focuses on patients, not paperwork. Built for dental practices in Nepal. Join the waitlist for early access.
